patch.descriptionTemplate: Murphy: Fauxborn gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Murphy: Fauxborn inflicts [Arg2]% of the DMG she deals as {Sacrifice} stacks on the target. Gain 2 stacks of {Life Seal}. At turn start, gain 1 stack of {Life Seal}. At turn end, if in {Surging Tides} stance, gain 1 extra stack of {Life Seal}.
